REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JEFFREY SHAW MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT MR. COTTON IS PART OF DEFENDANT SHAW'S HOUSEHOLD.
